name: North Carolina Grated Sweet Potato Pudding
recipeIngredient: 5 cups Sweet Potatoes, Raw, coarsely grated
1/2 cup Coconut, Shredded, fresh or prepared
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 400°F. Mix all the ingredients together and pour into a buttered, medium-size casserole or skillet. Bake for 50 to 60 minutes. As crust forms around edges during baking, remove from oven and stir pudding well to mix the crust throughout. Do this several times until cooking is finished. Serve warm or cold, plain or topped with cream or ice cream.
